text: Artificial intelligence is changing many parts of our lives, but its use raises important ethical questions. One major issue is bias. If AI is trained on data that contains human prejudices, it can make unfair decisions, for example when selecting job candidates or approving loans. This relates to fairness: AI systems must be designed to treat everyone equally. Privacy is another concern. Many AI tools collect personal data, so it is essential to protect this information from misuse. Finally, transparency is key. People should understand how AI reaches its decisions. These principles guide responsible AI development, ensuring technology benefits society without causing harm.
